title: Control step size for stability and accuracy
description: Set the time step from the stability region and accuracy target, using adaptive control where dynamics vary.
body: Use when a fixed step either diverges or wastes effort on smooth regions. Do not pick a step by guess, since stability and accuracy both depend on it. Actions: estimate the stability limit for the solver, set the step within it, and use adaptive step control with an error estimate where the dynamics change scale. Validation signals include a stable trajectory and a local error estimate held within tolerance. Risk boundary: a step beyond the stability region diverges silently, so deny a fixed step that has not been checked against the stability limit.
